infoPlist.NSDocumentPickerUsageDescription: ShiftWell needs access to your files to import shift schedules.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: ShiftWell reads your sleep data to compare your actual sleep with your planned schedule and improve future recommendations.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: ShiftWell writes your planned sleep schedule so iOS Sleep Focus can activate automatically at bedtime.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: ShiftWell reads your calendar to detect work shifts and writes sleep blocks back as events.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsWriteOnlyAccessUsageDescripti: ShiftWell adds sleep plan events to your calendar.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: ShiftWell uses your location to calculate your commute time.

plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: ShiftWell reads your sleep data to compare your actual sleep with your planned schedule and improve future recommendations.
plugins.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: ShiftWell writes your planned sleep schedule so iOS Sleep Focus can activate automatically at bedtime.
